code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut prev = 0
mut has_prev = false
mut sorted = true
mut cur = ""
let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut is_space = true
  mut b = 0
  if i < n
    b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      is_space = true
    else
      is_space = false
    end
  end
  if is_space
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if has_prev
        if v < prev
          sorted = false
        end
      end
      prev = v
      has_prev = true
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
